tabs.tab_content: Ready-made websites are essential, fully functional WordPress websites that have been professionally built for you. These sites are provided in a ZIP file that can be uploaded and launched in minutes.

tabs.tab_title: Q2: Are these website really free?
tabs.tab_content:
Yes, these pre-built websites are completely free to use for both personal and commercial purposes. The only thing you have to worry about is getting a WordPress host and an Elementor Pro *paid* license.

You also have the option to request the full setup on a paid basis (if you want).

tabs.tab_title: Q3: What do I need to get started?
tabs.tab_content: You need a blank WordPress site and an active Elementor Pro license.

In every website/template, I include:

  1. Custom code
  2. Pre-designed pages & templates
  3. Pre-built Elementor Pro theme
  4. Ready-to-use global widgets
  5. Pre-designed forms & popups
  6. Step-by-step instructions
  7. Bonus features
  8. Assets (images, icons, and more)

tabs.tab_title: Q5: Why do I need this?
tabs.tab_content: You need this in order to jump-start your brand, save money on developer costs, and have a pre-optimized website.

tabs.tab_title: Q6: How easy is it to get started?
tabs.tab_content: Very easy. Once you have the .zip file downloaded to your computer, all you have to do is upload it to your Elementor Pro site, make a few changes, add your logo, and launch.
